data.title: 27th annual Mitchell's Run Thru Rockford to benefit Parent Project Muscular Dystrophy; USATF-certified 5K and Kids K.
data.description: This weekend in Rockford, Michigan, the 27th Annual Mitchell's Run Thru Rockford (MRTR) will take place, consisting of a USATF-certified 5K run/walk and Kids K event. The event aims to benefit Parent Project Muscular Dystrophy (PPMD), a nonprofit organization.

data.title: Investors urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP about Sarepta Therapeutics losses between June 22, 2023, and June 24, 2025.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP specializing in securities litigation, is urging investors who incurred losses in Sarepta to reach out to him. Individuals who bought or obtained Sarepta securities from June 22, 2023, to June 24, 2025, are encouraged to contact him directly to explore their potential options for recourse.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates PubMatic investors for losses exceeding $50,000 between Feb 27, 2025 and Aug 11, 2025. Contact James Wilson.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses of over $50,000 in PubMatic between February 27, 2025, and August 11, 2025, to reach out to him directly to explore potential courses of action. If your financial losses meet or exceed $50,000 within the specified period in connection to PubMatic, it is advised to contact James Wilson for further guidance and discussion on available options.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell's speech in Jackson Hole suggests markets expect a rate cut next month, with odds falling to around 70%. S&P 500 rises.
data.description: Market analysts are anticipating a potential interest rate reduction next month, although the likelihood has decreased to approximately 70%. Following Federal Reserve Chairman Powell's speech at the Jackson Hole Symposium, where he hinted at a more hawkish approach, the S&P 500 experienced an increase. Investors seem prepared for a shift in tone from the Federal Reserve.

data.title: Virtual conference on Enhancing Internal Communications through Multi-Channel Storytelling on September 24-25, 2025. Topics include podcasts, video, social media.
data.description: Dublin--A new conference titled "Enhancing Internal Communications Through Multi-Channel Storytelling" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This virtual event aims to provide professionals with the tools to enhance their internal communication strategies by utilizing impactful storytelling across multiple platforms. Attendees will delve into the newest techniques involving podcasts, videos, social media, and other communication channels, all aimed at effectively engaging and motivating employees. The conference will feature insights from industry leaders and provide a platform for exchanging ideas in this field of communication.
